evals.prompt: 帮我给末世废土世界观做一个 campaign，重点推余烬这个角色，目标是拉新，主打 Twitter 和 TikTok
evals.expected_output: A campaign focused on the moshi-feitu worldview with yu-jin as the primary character. Should produce strategy.md (acquisition goal, Twitter+TikTok focused), cast.md (yu-jin facet analysis), twitter.md, tiktok.md, and video-prompts/ with character PV and mood pieces. Video prompts should use cut-based composition (2 cuts × 12s for PV) with a transition strategy appropriate to yu-jin's personality. All prompts in English, no text in video prompts.
expectations: strategy.md exists under worldview/moshi-feitu/campaign/ with a valid slug
cast.md contains yu-jin's core tension and per-platform promotional facets
twitter.md contains image prompts and video prompts with English-only content
tiktok.md contains vertical video scripts with BGM and subtitle timing
video-prompts/character-pvs.md has 2-cut structure with transition strategy specified
No Chinese text in video prompts — all Chinese dialogue noted as post-production subtitles
Video cuts are each ≤12s with proper shot/subject/action/setting/lighting/style structure

evals.prompt: I want a full campaign for xuanxiao-zong (玄霄宗), using both yun-sheng and cang-yuan. This is a brand awareness campaign — I want all 5 platforms. Make the world teaser epic.
evals.expected_output: Multi-character brand campaign for xuanxiao-zong xianxia world. Should produce all output files (strategy, cast, reddit, twitter, tiktok, xiaohongshu, discord) plus video-prompts/. The world teaser should use 3 cuts × 12s with Progressive Reveal strategy (world → characters → conflict). Character PVs should consider High Contrast for characters with hidden sides. Cast analysis should differentiate the two characters' promotional facets across platforms.
expectations: strategy.md specifies 'Brand' purpose with both characters listed
cast.md has separate entries for yun-sheng and cang-yuan with different promotional facets
All 5 platform files generated (reddit.md, twitter.md, tiktok.md, xiaohongshu.md, discord.md)
video-prompts/world-teaser.md has 3 cuts with Progressive Reveal structure (aerial → characters → conflict)
video-prompts/character-pvs.md has separate PVs for each character with appropriate transition strategies
Character visual base inherited from concept-arts.md, scene backgrounds from concept-art/
xiaohongshu.md uses Chinese language with emotional tone, not tech curiosity

evals.prompt: 给苦艾做一个情绪向的小红书+Discord campaign，不需要大制作，就想做一些日常情绪内容来维持社区活跃度
evals.expected_output: A retention-focused, intimate campaign for ku-ai (post-apocalyptic world). Should focus on xiaohongshu (emotional image cards + mood piece video) and Discord (daily push content, morning messages, random events). Strategy should be 'Retention'. Video content should be mood pieces (1 cut × 12s) with Emotional Escalation or simple static shots. No world teaser needed. Tone should be warm/melancholic matching ku-ai's personality.
expectations: strategy.md specifies 'Retention' purpose focused on community engagement
Only xiaohongshu.md and discord.md generated (no reddit/twitter/tiktok)
xiaohongshu.md has 3-6 image cards with unified color palette and emotional copy in Chinese
discord.md has 5-7 daily push variants in ku-ai's voice
video-prompts/mood-pieces.md has 1-cut mood pieces (12s), no multi-cut PVs
No world teaser generated — this is not a brand campaign
Emotional tone matches ku-ai's character from basics.md
